---
title: "Lead Follow-Up Sequence"
description: "A lifecycle project for turning car inquiries into appointments, test drives, and closed sales."
date: 2026-02-20
categories: [Lifecycle, CRM, Close Rate]
image: ../assets/argtech-sales-dashboard.png
---

## Business Question

How can Arg Tech turn digital inquiries into appointments, test drives, and closed vehicle sales?

## Campaign Design

The sequence uses three segments: new subscribers, engaged subscribers, and inactive subscribers. Each group receives different messaging based on behavioral signals such as signup source, first click, and previous purchase or inquiry activity.

| Email | Goal | Primary KPI |
|---|---|---|
| Welcome | Confirm value proposition | Open rate |
| Education | Explain benefits and use cases | Click-through rate |
| Proof | Build trust with case evidence | Content engagement |
| Offer | Prompt next action | Conversion rate |
| Re-engagement | Recover inactive users | Return visit rate |

## Testing Plan

The first A/B test compares benefit-led subject lines against urgency-led subject lines. A second test compares a single call to action against multiple content links.

## Recommendation

Use behavior-based branching after the second email. Subscribers who click educational content should receive proof and comparison messaging, while subscribers who do not click should receive a shorter value reminder before the offer.

## Employer-Relevant Skills

- Lifecycle journey planning
- Segmentation logic
- Email KPI selection
- A/B testing design
